mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing output and corporate revenue capacity, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of months when INDPRO rises month-over-month, or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above 5.0 percent indicates a restrictive monetary stance that elevates discount rates and debt service costs, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: When FEDFUNDS exceeds 5.0%, positive 60-day forward returns occur in more than 50% of triggered periods, or the Rank IC during triggered periods falls below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrently elevated consumer price inflation and the federal funds rate create a restrictive real monetary environment that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: high inflation and high nominal rates
failure_condition: Periods where both CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS are in their upper terciles produce positive 20-day forward returns in more than 50% of instances, or the interaction Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A positive reversal in real GDP growth immediately following a quarter of negative growth signals a post-shock recovery in aggregate demand, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 reversals following a negative quarter fail to generate positive 60-day forward returns in at least 60% of instances, or the strategy Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the unemployment rate of more than 0.2 percentage points over three months indicates deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce household income and consumption, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: After UNRATE rises more than 0.2 percentage points over three months, 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Negative month-over-month growth in retail sales signals weakening consumer demand and downward earnings revisions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: When RSAFS declines month-over-month, 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of instances, or the Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in monthly housing starts indicates contracting residential investment and dampened construction activity, which reduces cyclical earnings and generates negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: When HOUST declines month-over-month, 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of instances, or the Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month declines in industrial production and retail sales confirm a coordinated slowdown in both supply and demand, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: When both INDPRO and RSAFS decline month-over-month, 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of instances, or the interaction Rank IC is below 0.03.
